summary: Targeted validation of deployment fix: env.production.example presence, git-tracked status, required variables coverage, README reference update, and login regression. All 4 checks PASS.

file_exists_and_not_gitignored.detail: /app/env.production.example exists. `git check-ignore env.production.example` exits with code 1 (not ignored). File is a valid candidate for commit.

required_variables_present.detail: All required variables found in env.production.example: MONGO_ROOT_USER, MONGO_ROOT_PASSWORD, DB_NAME, PUBLIC_URL, CORS_ORIGINS, JWT_SECRET, ENCRYPTION_KEY, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, STRIPE_API_KEY. Bonus vars also included (JWT_ALGORITHM, GOOGLE_OAUTH_*, LINKEDIN_*).

readme_updated.detail: README_DEPLOYMENT.md references `env.production.example` in setup step (`cp env.production.example .env`). No stale `.env.example` reference in setup instructions.

login_regression.detail: POST /api/auth/login with demo@logirent.fr/demo1234 returned HTTP 200 with a valid JWT token and user payload. Preview app not affected by deployment file additions.

critical_code_review_comments: Root-cause fix is correct: Emergent platform excludes .env* patterns from GitHub push, so renaming to env.production.example (no leading dot) makes it push-safe. Verified via git check-ignore.
Consider adding a top-level note in README_DEPLOYMENT.md explaining WHY the file is named env.production.example instead of the more conventional .env.example (helps future maintainers).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deployment file fix (env.production.example + README update) validated. VPS deployment root cause resolved for future GitHub pushes.
